description:
## Real-Time System Health Tracker

**Last Updated**: 2026-04-16
**Owned By**: HR Agent
**Frequency**: Daily updates (as conditions change)

---

## CRITICAL BLOCKERS (Block Progress)

### 1. VITA-323: FE Technical Regression [BLOCKED]
- **Issue**: Self-created issue execution-pin anomaly blocks new issue creation workflow
- **Owner**: Founding Engineer (ed683b84...)
- **Status**: 🔴 ERROR. FE agent is in error status. Escalating to PA for recovery.
- **Impact**: Blocks creation of new agent-executed tasks and platform-level work.
- **ETA**: Pending PA investigation/restart.
- **Action**: HR to escalate to PA via [VITA-406](/VITA/issues/VITA-406).

### 2. VITA-364: Q2 Brand Strategy Board Approval [RESOLVED/GATED]
- **Issue**: Board approved Option A on Apr 11.
- **Status**: ⏳ GATED on Business Builder (BB) revised timeline delivery.
- **Impact**: All strategy-dependent tasks cannot proceed.
- **ETA**: TBD (awaiting BB input).
- **Action**: Monitor BB progress on [VITA-401](/VITA/issues/VITA-401).

### 3. VITA-211: ArchDaily Submission [BLOCKED]
- **Issue**: Metadata dependency on VITA-226 (source-of-truth)
- **Owner**: Brand Storyteller (1b2e7035...)
- **Status**: 🟡 IN PROGRESS (via [VITA-233](/VITA/issues/VITA-233)). User is working on metadata.
- **Impact**: Delays publication visibility.
- **ETA**: Depends on User response to [VITA-233](/VITA/issues/VITA-233).
- **Action**: Monitor [VITA-233](/VITA/issues/VITA-233) for completion.

---

## CAPACITY CONSTRAINTS

### PA Workload
- **Assessment**: Sustainable; four critical tracks in parallel. Oversight role active.
- **Recommendation**: Prioritize FE agent recovery to unblock platform operations.

### Unassigned Backlog (~60 tasks)
- **Assessment**: Backlog has grown significantly (~12 -> ~60).
- **Recommendation**: Implement auto-routing (Phase 2) to distribute load to active agents (BB, DPM, HR, OC).

### Active Capacity
- BB: Active on [VITA-401](/VITA/issues/VITA-401)
- DPM: Active on [VITA-420](/VITA/issues/VITA-420)
- OC: Active on [VITA-372](/VITA/issues/VITA-372)
- HR: Active on [VITA-406](/VITA/issues/VITA-406) and [VITA-457](/VITA/issues/VITA-457)

---

## HEALTH SUMMARY

| Dimension | Status | Trend | Notes |
|-----------|--------|-------|-------|
| Blocker Severity | 🔴 HIGH | ➡️ Stable | FE error is critical; BS/Board issues moving |
| Team Utilization | ✅ IMPROVED | ⬆️ Up | 5/7 agents active (Apr 11 baseline: 4/7) |
| System Throughput | 🟡 CONSTRAINED | ⬇️ Down | Blocked by FE error and backlog growth |

---

## NEXT ACTIONS

1. **FE Recovery**: PA to investigate and restart FE agent.
2. **Auto-Routing**: Implement logic to distribute ~60 task backlog.
3. **Metadata Handoff**: Monitor [VITA-233](/VITA/issues/VITA-233) to unblock [VITA-211](/VITA/issues/VITA-211).

For detailed analysis, see [agent-health-2026-04-16.md](/VITA/issues/VITA-446#document-agent-health-2026-04-16).
comment: Updated tracker for 2026-04-16. FE agent in error, backlog grown to ~60 tasks, 5/7 agents now active.
